name: popover
title: Popover
description: Anchored panel for mid-range tasks such as share sheets and short forms. Prefer Options Panel for denser inspectors, and Tooltip for hover-only hints.

api.description: Anchored panel for mid-range tasks such as share sheets and short forms. Compose header, body, and footer with kit controls. Prefer Options Panel for denser inspectors, and Tooltip for hover-only hints.

props.name: open
props.description: Controlled open state. Placement still uses PopoverTrigger when something else sets open.

props.name: defaultOpen
props.description: Initial open state when open is not passed. The popover manages open after that.

props.name: onOpenChange
props.description: Called when open changes from the trigger, dismiss, PopoverClose, or parent updates.

props.name: children
props.description: Usually PopoverTrigger and PopoverContent.

groups.title: PopoverTrigger
groups.description: Placement anchor and usual toggle. The panel positions relative to this element when open.

props.name: render
props.description: Host element for the trigger. Toggles open and marks the anchor.

props.name: children
props.description: Trigger content when not using render.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional styles on the trigger host.

props.name: variant
props.description: Surface recipe. muted softens fill and caret elevation. elevated strengthens shadow. inverse flips against the nearest .dark theme. Chrome props override recipe tokens.

props.name: size
props.description: Density for padding, type, radius, and max width. Padding and radius props override the size recipe.

props.name: showArrow
props.description: Show a caret toward the trigger. The anchoring engine keeps the caret aimed at the trigger after collision clamping. Uses filter elevation so the shadow includes the caret silhouette.

props.name: animated
props.description: Open motion with opacity, scale, and short travel from the placement side. Set false for an instant panel. prefers-reduced-motion disables motion.

props.name: background
props.description: Panel fill. Prefer tokens such as var(--popover). Sets --df-popover-surface.

props.name: foreground
props.description: Panel text color. Prefer tokens such as var(--popover-foreground). Sets --df-popover-surface-fg.

props.name: borderColor
props.description: Border color. Prefer tokens such as var(--border). Sets --df-popover-border-color.

props.name: borderWidth
props.description: Border width step. Maps to --border-width-* via --df-popover-border-width.

props.name: shadow
props.description: Elevation override. Without showArrow, prefer box-shadow tokens and sets --df-popover-shadow. With showArrow, prefer filter tokens such as var(--df-shadow-popover) and sets --df-popover-elevation.

props.name: radius
props.description: Corner radius step. Maps to --radius-* via --df-popover-radius.

props.name: cornerShape
props.description: Instance corner curve. Omit to inherit --df-corner-shape from the theme (set at create/init).

props.name: padding
props.description: Inset on all sides. Prefer spacing tokens. Sets each --df-popover-inset-*.

props.name: paddingX
props.description: Horizontal inset. Sets --df-popover-inset-left and --df-popover-inset-right.

props.name: paddingY
props.description: Vertical inset. Sets --df-popover-inset-top and --df-popover-inset-bottom.

props.name: paddingTop
props.description: Top inset. Sets --df-popover-inset-top. Wins over paddingY and padding.

props.name: paddingRight
props.description: Right inset. Sets --df-popover-inset-right. Wins over paddingX and padding.

props.name: paddingBottom
props.description: Bottom inset. Sets --df-popover-inset-bottom. With a direct PopoverFooter child, applied as footer bottom padding.

props.name: paddingLeft
props.description: Left inset. Sets --df-popover-inset-left. Wins over paddingX and padding.

props.name: gap
props.description: Gap between header, body, and footer. Prefer spacing tokens. Sets --df-popover-gap.

props.name: side
props.description: Preferred side. bottom and top are the usual bi-directional pair. left and right are supported. With collisionAvoidance, the panel can flip when space is tight.

props.name: align
props.description: Alignment along the side. start, center, and end pin the panel. auto picks the best of those from available space.

props.name: sideOffset
props.description: Distance in pixels between the trigger and the panel along the placement side.

props.name: alignOffset
props.description: Shift in pixels along the alignment axis. Positive values move toward the end edge.

props.name: matchTriggerWidth
props.description: Lock the panel width to the trigger. Off by default so the panel sizes to content within the size max width.

props.name: portal
props.description: When true, render in document.body and copy the nearest .dark ancestor from the trigger. When false, render inline in the trigger tree.

props.name: dismissOnScroll
props.description: Close when the page or an ancestor scrolls. Set false for panels with drag or scrollable controls.

props.name: followScroll
props.description: Reposition while the page or an ancestor scrolls. Set false to keep the last placement until the next open.

props.name: collisionAvoidance
props.description: Flip and shift the panel to stay in view. Set false to keep the requested side and align.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional styles on the panel.

props.name: children
props.description: Panel content. Compose PopoverHeader, PopoverBody, and PopoverFooter as needed.

groups.title: PopoverHeader
groups.description: Stacks the title row and description. Use PopoverHeaderBar when the title shares a row with close.

props.name: gap
props.description: Space between the title row and description. Prefer spacing tokens. Sets --df-popover-header-gap.

props.name: children
props.description: Usually PopoverHeaderBar then PopoverDescription, or title and description alone.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional styles on the header.

groups.title: PopoverHeaderBar
groups.description: Title row with an end-aligned close or action on one midline.

props.name: gap
props.description: Space between the title and trailing control. Prefer spacing tokens. Sets --df-popover-header-bar-gap.

props.name: children
props.description: PopoverTitle first, then PopoverClose (often a ghost icon-xs Button).

props.name: className
props.description: Additional styles on the title row.

groups.title: PopoverTitle
groups.description: Panel title and accessible name. badge is an open ReactNode slot for status or meta.

props.name: color
props.description: Title color. Prefer tokens. Sets --df-popover-title-color.

props.name: fontSize
props.description: Title size. Prefer type tokens. Sets --df-popover-title-size.

props.name: fontWeight
props.description: Title weight. Prefer tokens. Sets --df-popover-title-weight.

props.name: fontFamily
props.description: Title font family. Prefer theme font tokens. Sets --df-popover-title-font.

props.name: lineHeight
props.description: Title line height. Prefer tokens. Sets --df-popover-title-leading.

props.name: letterSpacing
props.description: Title letter spacing. Prefer tokens. Sets --df-popover-title-tracking.

props.name: badge
props.description: Open slot beside or under the title. Any ReactNode; Badge is common but not required.

props.name: badgePosition
props.description: end places the slot on the title row. below stacks it under the title.

props.name: children
props.description: Title text. Sets the accessible name on the panel.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional styles on the title.

props.name: color
props.description: Description color. Prefer tokens. Sets --df-popover-description-color.

props.name: fontSize
props.description: Description size. Prefer type tokens. Sets --df-popover-description-size.

props.name: fontWeight
props.description: Description weight. Prefer tokens. Sets --df-popover-description-weight.

props.name: fontFamily
props.description: Description font family. Prefer theme font tokens. Sets --df-popover-description-font.

props.name: lineHeight
props.description: Description line height. Prefer tokens. Sets --df-popover-description-leading.

props.name: letterSpacing
props.description: Description letter spacing. Prefer tokens. Sets --df-popover-description-tracking.

props.name: children
props.description: Supporting copy. Wired as aria-describedby when present.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional styles on the description.

groups.title: PopoverBody
groups.description: Main content region between header and footer.

props.name: children
props.description: Kit controls such as Input, Toggle Group, and Switch.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional styles on the body.

groups.title: PopoverFooter
groups.description: Action row. Default end-aligned. As a direct child of PopoverContent, receives the panel bottom inset by default. paddingTop and paddingBottom are independently overridable.

props.name: justify
props.description: Action distribution along the footer. end for Cancel and primary. between for Previous and Next on opposite ends. start for a leading control.

props.name: paddingTop
props.description: Space above the actions. Prefer spacing tokens. Sets --df-popover-footer-padding-top. Default 0.

props.name: paddingBottom
props.description: Space below the actions. Prefer spacing tokens. Sets --df-popover-footer-padding-bottom. Default matches Content bottom inset when this footer is a direct child.

props.name: paddingX
props.description: Horizontal inset inside the footer. Prefer spacing tokens. Sets --df-popover-footer-padding-x. Default 0.

props.name: gap
props.description: Space between actions. Prefer spacing tokens. Sets --df-popover-footer-gap.

props.name: children
props.description: Usually Cancel via PopoverClose then a primary Button, or Previous and Next with justify between.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional styles on the footer.

groups.title: PopoverClose
groups.description: Dismisses the panel and returns focus to the trigger.

props.name: render
props.description: Host element to merge onto, usually a Button. Prefer ghost icon-xs in PopoverHeaderBar.

props.name: children
props.description: Label or icon for the close control.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional styles on the close host.

props.name: Dismiss
props.description: Closes the panel and returns focus to the trigger when focus was inside.

props.name: Role
props.description: Anchored dialog. Use PopoverTitle for an accessible name, or aria-label on PopoverContent.

props.name: High contrast
props.description: Under forced-colors, the panel keeps a visible border and the trigger keeps a focus outline.

groups.title: Tokens
groups.description: Theme defaults live on :root. Override these globally or on a local host.

props.name: --df-popover-width-sm
props.description: Max width for size sm.

props.name: --df-popover-width
props.description: Max width for size md.

props.name: --df-popover-width-lg
props.description: Max width for size lg.

props.name: --df-popover-width-safe
props.description: Viewport-clamped md width for consumers.

props.name: --df-popover-arrow-size
props.description: Caret edge length.

props.name: --df-popover-arrow-offset
props.description: Caret overlap on the panel edge. Shared with Tooltip.

props.name: --df-popover-arrow-align-nudge
props.description: Half-caret optical nudge for the trigger-tracked caret. Shared with Tooltip.

props.name: --df-anchor-arrow-cross
props.description: Trigger-centered caret offset on the cross axis. Set by the anchoring engine after collision clamping.

props.name: --df-anchor-arrow-cross-inset
props.description: Minimum inset that keeps the trigger-tracked caret on the panel edge.

props.name: --df-popover-surface
props.description: Panel fill. Set by background or variant.

props.name: --df-popover-surface-fg
props.description: Panel text. Set by foreground or variant.

props.name: --df-popover-border-color
props.description: Border and caret edge color. Set by borderColor.

props.name: --df-popover-border-width
props.description: Border width. Set by borderWidth.

props.name: --df-popover-shadow
props.description: Box shadow when showArrow is false. Set by shadow or variant.

props.name: --df-popover-elevation
props.description: Filter elevation when showArrow is true. Default var(--df-shadow-popover); muted uses var(--df-shadow-tooltip); elevated uses var(--df-shadow-popover-elevated).

props.name: --df-shadow-popover
props.description: Default drop-shadow for caret popovers.

props.name: --df-shadow-popover-elevated
props.description: Stronger drop-shadow for elevated caret popovers.

props.name: --df-popover-radius
props.description: Corner radius. Set by radius or size.

props.name: --df-popover-inset-top
props.description: Shared top inset. Set by padding, paddingY, or paddingTop.

props.name: --df-popover-inset-right
props.description: Shared right inset. Set by padding, paddingX, or paddingRight.

props.name: --df-popover-inset-bottom
props.description: Shared bottom inset. Set by padding, paddingY, or paddingBottom. Applied to Content or Footer when a footer is present.

props.name: --df-popover-inset-left
props.description: Shared left inset. Set by padding, paddingX, or paddingLeft.

props.name: --df-popover-padding-top
props.description: Resolved top padding. Defaults to --df-popover-inset-top.

props.name: --df-popover-padding-right
props.description: Resolved right padding. Defaults to --df-popover-inset-right.

props.name: --df-popover-padding-bottom
props.description: Resolved bottom padding. Defaults to --df-popover-inset-bottom; 0 with a direct footer child.

props.name: --df-popover-padding-left
props.description: Resolved left padding. Defaults to --df-popover-inset-left.

props.name: --df-popover-gap
props.description: Gap between header, body, and footer. Set by gap.

props.name: --df-popover-header-gap
props.description: Gap between title row and description. Set by PopoverHeader gap.

props.name: --df-popover-header-bar-gap
props.description: Gap between title and close in PopoverHeaderBar. Set by PopoverHeaderBar gap.

props.name: --df-popover-footer-padding-top
props.description: Footer top padding. Set by PopoverFooter paddingTop.

props.name: --df-popover-footer-padding-bottom
props.description: Footer bottom padding. Defaults to --df-popover-inset-bottom with a direct footer child.

props.name: --df-popover-footer-padding-x
props.description: Footer horizontal padding. Set by PopoverFooter paddingX.

props.name: --df-popover-footer-gap
props.description: Gap between footer actions. Set by PopoverFooter gap.

props.name: --df-popover-title-color
props.description: Title color. Set by PopoverTitle color.

props.name: --df-popover-title-size
props.description: Title font size. Set by PopoverTitle fontSize.

props.name: --df-popover-title-weight
props.description: Title weight. Set by PopoverTitle fontWeight.

props.name: --df-popover-title-font
props.description: Title font family. Set by PopoverTitle fontFamily.

props.name: --df-popover-title-leading
props.description: Title line height. Set by PopoverTitle lineHeight.

props.name: --df-popover-title-tracking
props.description: Title letter spacing. Set by PopoverTitle letterSpacing.

props.name: --df-popover-description-color
props.description: Description color. Set by PopoverDescription color.

props.name: --df-popover-description-size
props.description: Description font size. Set by PopoverDescription fontSize.

props.name: --df-popover-description-weight
props.description: Description weight. Set by PopoverDescription fontWeight.

props.name: --df-popover-description-font
props.description: Description font family. Set by PopoverDescription fontFamily.

props.name: --df-popover-description-leading
props.description: Description line height. Set by PopoverDescription lineHeight.

props.name: --df-popover-description-tracking
props.description: Description letter spacing. Set by PopoverDescription letterSpacing.
